description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single test stage and global variables GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY=recursive and OLCF_SERVICE_ACCOUNT=ums036_auser. Define six jobs—legion_cmake_rocm571, legion_cmake_rocm600, legion_cmake_rocm613, legion_cmake_rocm624, legion_cmake_rocm631, legion_cmake_rocm641—each running on runners tagged slurm, frontier, and login12, using the same script steps: .gitlab/prep_script.sh then .gitlab/test_script.sh, with a retry policy of max 0 on runner_system_failure and unknown_failure and an OLCF ID token. For every job set common variables DEBUG=0, LEGION_WARNINGS_FATAL=1, TEST_CTEST=1, TEST_REGENT=0, USE_CMAKE=1, and set job‑specific variables: ROCM_VERSION to 5.7.1, 6.0.0, 6.1.3, 6.2.4, 6.3.1, and 6.4.1 respectively, and SCHEDULER_PARAMETERS to the listed values for each ROCM version. All jobs inherit the global variables and run only in the test stage.
